# Ismail Systems

> Ismail Systems LLC provides "Third Shift," an AI phone-answering service that takes after-hours calls for HVAC, plumbing, and electrical contractors on the North Shore of Chicago. It is built and run by Sam Ismail, who checks its work every night.

Third Shift answers a shop's after-hours line as the shop's own company, tells a real emergency from a routine call, books the job onto the shop's schedule, pages the on-call tech for real emergencies, and texts the caller back. The owner reviews every call nightly and sends a written report each Monday.

## Key facts
- Service: after-hours AI phone answering for trades contractors (HVAC, plumbing, electrical)
- Area served: North Shore of Chicago, Illinois — Evanston, Wilmette, Skokie, Winnetka, Glenview, Morton Grove, Niles, Park Ridge
- Contact: (847) 906-2560 (call or text)
- Pricing: $3,000 set-up (half at signing, half at go-live), then $1,500 per 30 days, month-to-month
- Guarantee: at least five new booked jobs in the first 30 days, or the full $4,500 back, in writing
- Operator: Sam Ismail (Sameer Ismail), founder — builds and runs AI systems for a living
- Distinctive: a single accountable person, not a call center or a faceless AI vendor; the phones stay on the shop's own number and can be switched off any time

## Links
- Home: https://ismailsystems.com/
- Privacy & text-message terms: https://ismailsystems.com/privacy.html
